title: ZatrixLagX
body:
# 📌 ZatrixLagX — Optimize your Minecraft server like never before!

- Author: AloneScripts
- Minecraft Version: 1.21+
- Type: Performance Plugin


---

## 🛠️ What is ZatrixLagX?

****ZatrixLagX is a lightweight and powerful lag reduction plugin designed for Paper servers.
It automatically clears unnecessary entities, items, and optimizes performance to keep your server running smooth — even with many players online.****

Perfect for survival, SMPs, and large multiplayer servers, ZatrixLagX makes server management effortless.


---

## ✨ Features

/zlag clear → Instantly remove dropped items and entities causing lag.

/zlag check → See current entity counts and performance stats.

Entity Tracking → Monitors mobs/items that slow down your server.

Broadcasts → Sends warnings before clearing items so players don’t lose valuables.

Configurable Messages → Customize alerts to match your server style.

Admin Tools → Commands available only for staff with permissions. 



---

## 🚀 Why Use ZatrixLagX?

Reduces server lag caused by excessive mobs/items.

Keeps TPS stable for smoother gameplay.

Fully customizable — you decide timings, warnings, and what gets cleared.

Easy to install and lightweight — no complex setup needed.



---

## 📦 Commands

/zlag clear → Clear lag manually (Admin Only)

/zlag check → Check entities/mobs count

/zlag killmobs → Removes all hostile mobs (zombies, creepers, skeletons, etc.)

/zlag killanimals → Removes all passive mobs (cows, sheep, pigs, chickens, etc.)

/zlag killboats → Removes all boats and minecarts

/zlag ram → Shows current server RAM usage

/zlag → See all commands

Etc

---

## 🔧 Requirements 

Minecraft 1.21+ (Paper/Spigot)

Java 17+



---

## 🎯 Who is it for?

ZatrixLagX is perfect for:

SMP servers with many players.

Survival servers where entities pile up.

Hosting providers who want optimized performance.



---

👉 ****With ZatrixLagX, your players get a lag-free experience, and you get peace of mind.****


---
